emptyState: Desktop can resolve the prompt, show you where it came from, and keep the exact text ready for copy/paste.
promptDescription: Copy the full prompt exactly as shown before pasting it into your AI CLI.
tipDescription: Open your preferred CLI in the suggested directory, paste the prompt, and come back after applying the recommended changes.

steps.openTool: Open the AI CLI tool you want to use.
steps.runFromDirectory: Run it from the suggested working directory: {{path}}
steps.runFromCurrentDirectory: Run it from the most relevant working directory for this task.
steps.returnToDesktop: Follow the generated instructions and return to Desktop when you are done.

errors.title: Prompt guidance unavailable
errors.defaultMessage: Desktop could not resolve the requested prompt guidance.
errors.promptNotFound: Desktop could not find the prompt file for this workflow.
errors.resolverUnavailable: Desktop prompt resolution is not ready yet.
errors.managerUnavailable: Desktop cannot load version prompt guidance right now.
errors.promptLoadFailed: Desktop failed to load the version prompt.
errors.promptReadFailed: Desktop found the prompt file but could not read it.
